data.content: Implementation: extended src/lib/__tests__/knots-canonical-metadata.test.ts createLease describe block from 3 cases to 5 (one per non-unknown AgentProviderId provider: Claude, Codex, Gemini, Copilot, OpenCode); each asserts the exact kno lease create argv via a shared assertCanonicalLeaseArgs helper. Added src/lib/__tests__/knots-lease-roundtrip.test.ts with per-provider round-trip: createLease (mocked execFile) -> synthesized kno lease show JSON -> ExecutionAgentInfo derivation -> deep-equal vs input. Hermetic — mocks node:child_process. Quality gates: lint, tsc --noEmit, full test suite (3117 pass), build all green.
